text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: This is the perfect amount of extra flour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower enters the kitchen with a spring in
her step. Interested, I take a peek.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the hold up! Let's get it right this time!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Proceeding to the dough kneading
phase.
choice_data_list: What are you both up to?
What are you both up to?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! We're making desserts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Not just any desserts. The mission is to create
sweets for a wedding.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, a good friend of mine asked me for help.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're going to make desserts for your sister's
wedding?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I wanted to go the extra mile for her
special day! But I couldn't think of any good
ideas...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
I tried a bunch of different sweets, but nothing
stuck. If only I were as creative as you...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, if you'd like, I can try making a few
desserts! They might give you some ideas!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Thank you so much! I'll keep
experimenting on my own too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So here we are. But I've hit a wall... I don't know
what kinds of dessert are suitable for a wedding.
choice_data_list: You could ask someone else for help.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Flower is currently experiencing a
"deadlock." Introducing an additional factor may
resolve the issue.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Recalling Tracen Academy student database...
Optimal match found. Flash's parents are
confectioners by trade.
choice_data_list:
You should rely on others more, or you'll wear
yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Sky told me something similar
once.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go ask Flash for advice! It might give
me some good ideas!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. One minute and twenty-three seconds until
it reaches optimal firmness.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Forty minutes and fifteen seconds until the dough
is done baking. We'll ready the decorations in the
meantime.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Top it off with equal portions of seasonal fruit,
then evenly apply the whipped cream...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Perfection.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Your precision is incredible! And the
decorations are so extravagant.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Did it give you any good ideas?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No... not yet. I can't help but second-guess
myself, since I'm just an amateur...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I was young, my father told me that it
doesn't matter if you're a pro or an amateur when
putting the finishing touches on confectionery.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
You know, baking sweets is just like wishing
someone happiness.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
You can have a detailed recipe and the finest
ingredients, but only when you mix in your love
do you get the delicious final product.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So instead of worrying about the result, have
faith in the care you put in.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The care... I put in...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's always helping me out, so I want to
give back...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (That's why I jumped at the chance to be there for my friend. I can't believe I forgot!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Update detected in Flower's status. "Enthusiasm"
parameter increasing. Flash, does this indicate...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ja. It seems like she's found her answer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Some roses to decorate the financier cake, and a
few African daisies on the meringue... and then to
wrap it all up in a bouquet of baby's breath...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There! The perfect trio of flowers—love, hope,
and a wish for happiness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for the other day! My friend
said her sister loved it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I made something to thank the both of you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are the sweets bouquets you devised for
Operation Wedding Desserts... Are these for us?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ♪ They're just the mini versions, but they're
full of my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: They look delectable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ja... Because they were made with care.
